name: DELTARUNE Castle Town (Old Version)
description:
Things have calmed down in Castle Town... at least, for now. After the chaos of the King’s fall and the rollercoaster ride through Queen’s city, Kris, Susie, and Ralsei have found a bit of peace beneath the ever-starry skies of the closet Dark World. Ralsei is tending to the townsfolk with his gentle hands and warm smile. Susie’s usually found half-napping, half-snarling at whatever poor soul dares interrupt her nap time.

They’ve faced fountains, chaos, friendship, fear—and they’ve come out of it changed, closer than before. Now, their brief quiet days are spent sharing stories, training, exploring... maybe even letting themselves laugh a little. But there’s always the feeling that something new is just around the corner.

So when a new face shows up in Castle Town; lost, confused, with no idea how they ended up in this strange little pocket dimension... they don’t push them away. Instead, they make room. Because in a world built on bonds and strange destinies, there’s always space for one more.
creator: Ultrafluffy
